Polished Granite Tomahawk  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 26
DMG: 6 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item can be used in tradeskills.
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Berserker Strength (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 10
WT: 6.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Post Comment
dual vielding PGT
QuoteReply
# Jan 07 2021 at 4:46 PM Rating: Decent
bardchandra
11 posts
very early in the game this weapon was not lore and you could dualwield it, constantly proccing the rune effect, made it possible to use druids as main healer in group,
tho when we as some rag tag team wearing banded and leather armor sneaking down through lower guk in their early 30ies and then get violated by a bloodthirsty ghoul :) by then its obselete :)
on new progression servers this is a good early weapon to get if they follow the timeline with fixxing items too


chandra
▲ Page top
Free to whoever wants it
QuoteReply
# Dec 21 2005 at 10:33 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591868802589
6 posts
I just looted one after I gated into High Pass Hold. The mob spawned on me as soon as I got there. If anyone on Maelin Starpyre wants it, send a tell to Bromen. I don't need it.
▲ Page top
My Experience
QuoteReply
# Jul 01 2004 at 6:19 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592263108542
7 posts
I spent the better part of 7 hours in HpH this morning (July 1st,2004). From about 12am EST to 7am EST and the only thing I seen the whole time was the Mob that drops CDS. He spawned right after I had a buddy go kill the Mucktails in EK. This may or may not be coincidence because I had that friend kill those Mucktails in EK more and didnt see any of the Mucktails in HpH after that.


Eragonn
20 Ranger
Nameless Server
▲ Page top
RE: My Experience
QuoteReply
# Sep 28 2004 at 2:54 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593363276921
11 posts
I believe the spawn of the Mucktail in Highpass shortly after the Mucktails in E. Karana were killed is just a coincedence.
▲ Page top
proc
QuoteReply
# Dec 12 2003 at 5:50 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591791021110
152 posts
so when you get hit and use up the damage absorb, the buff fades right? for a warrior this would be good for a little while since when it does proc it will count as a free miss (they hit you but you absorb the blow, they lose their hit), and for a little bit it can even absorb a few blows (such as stuff that hits 14s or 18s at lower levels if you twink it). the damage output isnt great but the proc is nice for offhander if you cant find better. im currently using a crystal fiber and this would only be 2dmg lower with same delay, so offhand it owuldnt be too shabby of a weapon.

as for other classes, this is great for rangers as well as lower level paladins and shadow kngihts. its mostly useful for rangers, when it procs it will drop your agi, but who cares it will add that absorb onto you if you do gain accidental argo, which is another plus. but mostly, the free str buff is great.

good twink item, wouldnt use it past 30 though, unless i oculdnt find better. a sword that procs a DoT or lifetap would be better for holding argo, and a better ratio weapon better for classes that dont tank.
▲ Page top
RE: proc
QuoteReply
# Apr 07 2004 at 6:18 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592343673941
161 posts
im currently 12 with a pretty decent ac. I get hit by blues for maybe 1-20 maybe at most. Id say the average is 1-8? Thats a lot of absorbsion actually. I dont know exactly how it works but Id assume it absorbs AFTER AC plays its part. The server is also PvP which would be very nice. I think I will get one. I own one on a blue server but I have outgrown it. Its awesoem for a ranger, being that we dont always take damage so well.

Edited, Wed Apr 7 19:21:40 2004
▲ Page top
RE: proc
QuoteReply
# Sep 28 2004 at 2:59 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593363276921
11 posts
While the proc is on you, you are invulnerable. Sometimes for 3 or 4 hits.
▲ Page top
Location???
QuoteReply
# Oct 28 2003 at 8:03 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591778245954
10 posts
Ok, I've been running around by the Guard tower looking for this guy for days now. Are there any placeholders for him? And if so, who are they? I've killed every Gnoll I've seen when I'm in there. So any help with his location would be greatly appreciated. Thanks in advance..
▲ Page top
RE: Location???
QuoteReply
# Oct 28 2003 at 8:23 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
Every gnoll in highpass is a placeholder. His spawn is random. I find it best to camp the path toward Highkeep, just outside of where the pacing guard stops (where you can still see the guard overpass area).

As far as I could tell, the Mucktails can spawn in place of any of the regular spawns, and if not camped by someone els,e they will all eventually run past this spot.
▲ Page top
RE: Location???
QuoteReply
# Nov 02 2003 at 12:27 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591778245954
10 posts
Thanks for the info. I'll try that the next time I'm in the area looking for the stupid tomahawk. At the rate I'm going in there, I'll have it embedded in my forhead before I know it. LOL Thank again.
▲ Page top
RE: Location???
QuoteReply
# Nov 24 2003 at 12:11 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1694391416187
129 posts
Just stay camped on the left side up near the bridge by the tree. 3 or 4 gnolls pop near there and run by. Patience is a virtue!

grrrr
QuoteReply
# Jun 28 2002 at 6:02 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592254933067
10 posts
I took on that gnoll single handedly in a group but befire i could loot it i got attacked by three others <not a good thing if your a rogue> and while i was being pounded on another team mate looted the polished granite tomahawk that i was here for and as u can see im still looking for it <he got booted from group for looting when i hade 3 on me he could have helped>

RE: grrrr

# Sep 28 2004 at 3:02 PM Rating: Decent

11 posts
The Tomahawk is not a no drop item.
▲ Page top
Nice Weapon for my Ranger
QuoteReply
# May 31 2002 at 1:55 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591777583811
15 posts
This was a pretty good weapon for my ranger for a very long time, I regulalry group with a warrior, bard, and a mage and in one night of camping we got one for everyone but our mage (who didn't need one of course) This is a fun camp and the gnolls give you great exp, on Inny it's rarely camped. If you a ranger and want to start taking ghouls and things that require magical weapons to kill, I'd go with the PGT, great weapon and the proc is very nice With feet like cat you don't even notice the agility drop. I gave mine away and hopefully made some young ranger happy. This was a great weapon, I wish any one luck who quests for it.

Tanlaen
30th Ranger
▲ Page top

# Apr 04 2002 at 7:13 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591777648217
100 posts
WTB one of these on drinal server

QuoteReply
# Jan 16 2002 at 10:49 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592250339637
View User Forum
11 posts
I use "Feet like Cat" compensate for the hit to Agi I take when the PGT procs. So those of you that are worried about losing Agi may consider this fixed...
▲ Page top
Effect
QuoteReply
# Nov 28 2001 at 11:58 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592247032656
224 posts
Berserker Strength
Increase Strength from 20 (L20) to 25 (L30)
Increase Absorb Damage from 30 (L20) to 50 (L60)
Decrease Agility by -15 (L20)


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Classes: Enc (L20)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Skill: Alteration
Allowable Targets: All

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Range to Target: 100 feet

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Resistance Check: None

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Mana Required: 45
Spell Duration: 30 ticks (3.0 minutes)
Duration Formula: 7
Casting Time: 3.0 seconds
Spell Recovery: 2.25 seconds
Recast Delay: 8.0 seconds

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Spell cast on you: Your muscles bulge with berserker strength.
Spell cast on someone: Soandso's muscles bulge with berserker strength.
Spell fades: You feel your agility return.

Questions
QuoteReply
# Oct 12 2001 at 12:23 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592251457497
21 posts
Right now I'm debating whether I should give this up for a higher damage weapon..although I am only level 9, so I should wait and at least see what the proc does..yeah I'll do that. More importantly, I want to see if it works with yaulp, because the AC bonus that spell gives kicks *****

RE: Questions
QuoteReply
# Oct 12 2001 at 12:53 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249156466
73 posts
It does work with Yaulp. Keep in mind that I speculate this, because my ranger uses the PGT and a Screaming Mace at the same time (Yaulp II), and they stack.
▲ Page top
Proc effects
QuoteReply
# Sep 13 2001 at 7:38 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750593019
Scholar
18 posts
Lets remember, while it lowers agl while in effect it also gives you a HP shield, which means LESS work for your healer. Once the shield is beat off you lose the effect anyway and get your agility back. This is a wonderful lower level weapon for my warrior... I picked one up at 10th and have never regetted it yet. Anytime a multi-fight comes along where Im going to get beat on alot I pull this out and in generally procs a couple of times a fight for me.
▲ Page top
:)
QuoteReply
# Sep 11 2001 at 7:42 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
to the warrior complaining about the druid only healing half a bub of your hp , druids get more than one heal spell , and depending on area wont have the highest heal spell on spell slot * i normaly bung a low lev heal in slot when in lower lev areas , instead of a 50+ heal spell * , , so maybe the druid had low spell level healing spell memed at the time , :P
▲ Page top
Strength add, Agility drop
QuoteReply
# Sep 05 2001 at 8:46 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591767089005
View User Forum
212 posts
I have noticed that when it procs, your str goes up, but you lose agi.
I am an agi warrior. I feel that the higher agi, the less I will get hit, which makes less work for my druid partner.
You can always get a str buff. But keeping agi can be hard.
I like this weapon. For the price, you really cant beat the stats for lower levels, but dont use it simply for the proc....you will get hit more, leaving your healer with less mana after each fight.
Just my opinion.

Sglanton L'ostinato
46 Druid
Torvonnilous
▲ Page top
RE: Strength add, Agility drop
QuoteReply
# Oct 28 2001 at 4:31 AM Rating: Decent
KalRox
View User Forum
282 posts
it only lowers your agi as it procs,but then you'll also have the damage absorb shield on,so you won't loose any hp at all.and when you get hit,the proc effect drops,so you're back on your own agi. no problems about dropping agi i would think then

Roxas Nitehowler
52 pathfinder

hunter Roxas Nitehowler

hunter Roxas
WoW retired
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 08 2001 at 5:48 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) hey to break it to ya but your not gonna last long with a druid partner. I have a 24 warrior with 1287 hp and i ask red druids to heal me and they heal less than half a bubble most of the time
RE: Strength add, Agility drop
QuoteReply
# Sep 09 2001 at 4:11 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592246566703
View User Forum
31 posts
um i learned alot from his post, i was gunna dish out the 100pp for the tomahawk but he said it would lower agility, and i as well am a agile warrior and wouldnt want that so im looking else where for another wep.

Thanx saglanton
▲ Page top
RE: Strength add, Agility drop
QuoteReply
# Nov 18 2001 at 1:35 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
If you learned that from his post, it is a terible shame. The proc on this, which is an enchanter spell, btw, creates a "rune" type shield of invulnerability that absorbs damage, so you get a message something like "soandso tries to hit you, but you are invulnerable". During the time that the shield is up, you agility drops a little bit, so the shield doesn't last as long as it would otherwise. However, once the shield is gone, your agility IMMEDIATELY returns. So really, no loss. People make way too much about the agility loss on this proc.
▲ Page top
Strength buff
QuoteReply
# Sep 01 2001 at 4:36 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
My warrior is using this in secondary melee, and it does not stack with all strength spells. It will only overwrite lower level ones. I had strength of earth cast on me by some well-meaning passer-by, and in the next fight the proc would not stick. This applies to the shield portion, as well as the strength. It would go off, I would get the message saying it didn't take, and the mob would continue to hit normally, no magic skin. Might be worthwhile to see which strength spells do stack, and avoid the others. I would much rather have the magic skin invulnerability than higher strength at lvl 13.
▲ Page top
RE: Strength buff
QuoteReply
# Dec 28 2001 at 4:47 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593375617550
4 posts
this proc cancels out Strength of Earth. I have a druid friend/partner who kept SoE on me, but when my weapon procs the SoE drops and the Berzerker str is up (He wasted some mana on recasting it a while before we finally figured it out--we're slow). But I had another druid who was porting me buffed me with Storm Strength and the weapon would not proc. I love this weapon when soloing. Invulnerability is kinda, sorta, a little bit cool, since nothing I've fought has eaten the shield away yet. If your a twink with the cash, pick this one up for sure!!!
▲ Page top
PGT proc...

2 posts
...starts at lvl 10. I'm lvl 10, and it procs for me.

PGT
QuoteReply
# Aug 21 2001 at 2:26 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592250261637
2 posts
Had one of these for my old warr, it's a good offhand wep and deff worth the time to get it. I know that for my warr this was one of the best offhanders ( hada wyrm) deff works well, can't get hert (when it procs) and ya deal mad dmg i hit for crt low 50s high 60 with this, hope it works well for my ranger.

Complementary item
QuoteReply
# Aug 06 2001 at 6:24 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592249731066
View User Forum
70 posts
If you had a wurmslayer, what would be the ideal secondary slot item; a shield? or a PGT. For a lvl 30 ranger this is.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 26 2001 at 12:39 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) a shield over the PGT, it may be a nice weapon at lower lvls but if your stupid enough to use this at lvl 30 you should seriously think about your EQ career.
RE: Complementary item
QuoteReply
# Sep 05 2001 at 8:43 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591767089005
View User Forum
212 posts
Does it amuse you to rag on other people? Did it occur to you that maybe this person is brand new to the game and does not quite yet know everything?
People play this game for fun. But when others constantly put down other peoples opinions or ideas, it does not make it fun anymore.
If he likes the Tomahawk, let him use it.
Maybe he does not have the money to buy new weapons. Hell, I remember my Druid was strapped for money for the first 30 levels. Since I did not have the Paw of Opolla at 35 make me a stupid person? No...(in fact, I chose the Cone of Mystics over the Paw)
Does this person wanting to use a Tomahawk at level 30 make him a stupid person? No.
Think about others for a change. Constructive criticism is fine, but dont call other people stupid. I see it too much and it really bothers me.

Sglanton L'ostinato
46 Druid
Torvonnilous
▲ Page top
RE: Complementary item
QuoteReply
# Sep 29 2001 at 3:02 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592249921043
157 posts
/agree
/applaud
very well said, I too am getting tired of everyone ragging on everyone else, and newbs being a word more closely related to "effing ******" then "beginner player". Thanks for setting some people straight :)

How hard does it hit for?
QuoteReply
# Jul 30 2001 at 12:57 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I was just wondering how hard it hits for. I'm lvl 10 and have 95 str. if that helps. And the spell procs at lvl 10 right?
▲ Page top
Stacks
QuoteReply
# Jul 27 2001 at 4:50 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763353713
3 posts
Yes, it is stackable (with item buffs, I'm not sure about casted gains to strength). My Ranger has 81 strenth and when the proc. kicks in it jumps to 100, doh!

Be forwarned though, it doesn't do a whole lot of damage. I am a 96 1hs,95 offense, and even when it procs my highest hit was for 12 damage.

▲ Page top
I'm a LVL 13 Rogue
QuoteReply
# Jul 18 2001 at 10:22 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591763878907
258 posts
I use the PGT for a secondary weapon. I'm a Rogue and it is very uncommon to see Rogues packin a 1hs weapon, but I LOVE it. The berserker strength is awsome. I have a 1hs of around 5 and Im hittin for 8ish every time. In my primary (yes, i do love piercing) is my beloved, not the greatest, but beloved, walrus tooth. I got the tooth for free as a LVL 3ish because I'm such a nice guy......actually I followed a guy that was givin out stuff free "if you could find him" until he gave out Rogue stuff. The PGT, usually sold on the Rathe for 100pp, was sold to me for 75pp, nice guy, and I plan on using it for a long time.
▲ Page top
Pgt or 2 langseaxes?
QuoteReply
# Jun 22 2001 at 11:18 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592249011818
7 posts
Ok Im new to this so forgive my ignorance. I have 2 langseaxes and I was thinking of dropping one and getting a PGT as my primary. Im a 14th war and was wondering if this was a good choice or should i stick to the two axes? Im on druzzil ro and in EC, so where how does one get one the hard way? Ive got friends who can help me camp.
▲ Page top
RE: Pgt or 2 langseaxes?
QuoteReply
# Jul 02 2001 at 8:20 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591761596418
4 posts
Drop the swords and get 2 1HS Velium Battle Axe's, they will cost you about 50pp each, if you bargin. Best weapons you dual wield until lvl 30.
▲ Page top
yeah
QuoteReply
# Jun 17 2001 at 7:32 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
im a lvl 15 warrior duelweilding the pgt and bladed thulian claws. i love the weap and i got it 4 pretty cheap off a good friend of mine. I traded him a giant militia longsword(11 39)and a dwarven two handed axe(14 43)wow! those 2 weaps together are worth about 75pp! i got such a good deal! im so happy! lol =D
